title: The Encounter: Encounter with the Known
overview: After BUGS1 was wiped out by the surprising life on mars, U-NASA deployed 15 people as a part of BUGS2 to go to Mars to investigate and if possible to exterminate the cockroaches.

title: Undefeated: The Unbreakable Ones
overview: After BUGS1 was wiped out by the surprising life on mars, U-NASA deployed 15 people as a part of BUGS2 to go to Mars to investigate and if possible to exterminate the cockroaches.
